text: No owner or other person in possession of any ATV shall authorize or knowingly permit any person under sixteen years of age to operate such ATV in violation of any provision of this article.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 11
#### Article 48
##### § 2288 — Responsibility for operation by minors

No owner or other person in possession of any ATV shall authorize or knowingly permit any person under sixteen years of age to operate such ATV in violation of any provision of this article.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: No owner or other person in possession of any ATV shall authorize or knowingly permit any person under sixteen years of age to operate such ATV in violation of any provision of this article.
